message: Performance goal created with evaluator contract

evidence: Implemented Phase 4 TypeScript Language Service bridge: AST call edges carry target identifier positions; TypeScriptLanguageService resolves definitions from indexed source snapshots; definition resolver upgrades unresolved call edges to resolved_lsp with targetFile/targetSymbol metadata and falls back to original edges if LS fails; chunking pipeline runs import/export resolver then LSP resolver. Tests cover namespace import property calls resolved by LS, impact_analysis and trace_flow using LSP edges, unresolved calls staying explicit, and LS failure fallback. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build. Completion audit: AST call metadata records target identifier positions; TypeScriptLanguageService resolves definitions from current indexed snapshots; unresolved calls can be upgraded to resolved_lsp with targetFile/targetSymbol; impact_analysis and trace_flow consume those edges; unresolved calls remain explicit; language service failure returns the original AST graph.
